claimText: UT Austin responsible-adoption guidance includes academic integrity as a principle for AI use, linking responsible use to the honor code, scholarly values, ownership, and appropriate authorship of tool outputs.
normalizedValue: Academic integrity is an explicit responsible-adoption principle.

citation.citationTitle: Responsible Adoption of AI Tools for Teaching and Learning - Office of the Executive Vice President and Provost
